HomePage.title: Create interactive exercises to practice Argentine Spanish
HomePage.subtitle: Share them with students or practice with public exercises.
HomePage.createWorkspaceDesc: Create and share exercises with your students.
HomePage.noExercises: No exercises to practice available yet.
HomePage.enterTeacherName: Enter your name to get started
HomePage.workspaceCreatedDesc: Copy and save your access code. You will need it to manage your exercises later.

EditExercise.title: Edit Exercise
EditExercise.editSubtitle: Update your exercise content and save changes.
EditExercise.createSubtitle: Fill in the details to create a new exercise set.
EditExercise.exerciseTitleHelper: Give your exercise a clear and descriptive title.
EditExercise.question: Question
EditExercise.bulkInputPlaceholder:
Yo [fui] a la [escuela] ayer.
No [hables] (hablar) tan rápido.
EditExercise.bulkInputPlaceholderMultipleChoice:
No [hables] '{'hablas|hables|hablar'}' tan rápido.
Mañana [iremos] '{'vamos|iremos|fuimos'}' al cine.
EditExercise.bulkInputHelper: One exercise per line: Text with [answers] (optional hints)
EditExercise.bulkInputHelperMultipleChoice: One exercise per line: Text with [correct answer] '{'option1|option2|option3'}'
EditExercise.generateWithAI: Generate exercises with AI. Enter a topic in the title for better results.
EditExercise.validationErrorLine: Line {line}: Each line must contain at least one answer in [].
EditExercise.validationErrorMultipleChoice: Line {line}: Multiple choice exercise must have options in {}.
EditExercise.aiGenerationFailed: We couldn't generate the exercises right now. Please try again or use the manual prompt copy.

Results.title: Results
Results.subtitle: View student performance for this exercise set.
Results.noAttempts: No attempts yet. Share the link with your students to see results here!
